creator: kenrap@kennethraplee.com
text:
Here are my points to consider:
1) It makes the naming consistent with the other filesystems port names to their official project names.
2) It's more explicit about what the port actually is.
  * So there is no confusion when people are looking for "ntfs-3g" in the ports tree to build/install it.
3) It prevents the tiny possibility of a port name conflict when including a future port with "ntfs" as the actual project's name.
  * Despite that possibility, it doesn't hurt to be preventative in general.
